reason: Fix wave_status query: parse task_ids from JSON string to array before using with inArray and length. Without parsing, SQLite TEXT column returns a JSON string making inArray produce incorrect SQL IN clause and length return string length instead of array count.

Fix fanOutRowToType to parse task_ids from JSON string when it arrives from SQLite TEXT column (not auto-parsed like PG jsonb). Without this, all callers of getFanOutGroup get a string instead of an array.

Fix claimTask write-side bug: when existing.task_ids comes from SQLite TEXT column as a JSON string, [...existing.task_ids, taskId] spreads characters of the string instead of array elements. Parse JSON first.
